label: Transparent geyser plume motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a geyser plume motif for a design system named Morphous Geyser: white steam burst rising from a vivid blue geothermal pool rimmed with mineral tan deposits, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single stylized-realistic geyser plume at the instant of eruption, tall white steam column and upward spray, turquoise-blue pool at the base, tan silica/mineral terrace rim, crisp energetic silhouette suitable for a UI motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, vertical plume fully visible, base pool visible, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean geothermal basin daylight, burst alert system feel, high contrast between white steam, blue pool, mineral tan rim, and subtle gray shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape horizon, no people, no buildings, no animals, no cartoon face, no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no purple or magenta in the subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Geyser" derived from a geyser plume motif: white steam burst, bright blue geothermal pool, tan mineral deposits, burst alert system feel.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, alert states, and interaction language from a geothermal basin geyser: white steam, mineral tan terraces, turquoise-blue pool, dark wet stone shadows, upward plume energy. This light board is the primary reference for coding a future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class design-system poster composition.
Required visible sections: Morphous Geyser, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, token charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, restrained operational alert interface, 8px card radius, plume-column vertical dividers, mineral-rim borders, blue-pool focus rings, steam-soft surfaces, exact component states.
Palette direction: light steam background, deep basin ink, pool blue primary, mineral tan secondary, silica white surfaces, steam gray muted, warning orange only as a minimal alert signal.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no beach/ocean theme, no volcano lava, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny labels, no misspelling of "Morphous Geyser".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Geyser". It must feel like the dark translation of the light Morphous Geyser system: white steam burst, bright blue geothermal pool, tan mineral deposits, burst alert system feel.
Reference use: Preserve the same motif language and component coverage from the light board: plume-column vertical rhythm, mineral-rim borders, blue-pool focus rings, steam-soft surfaces, operational alert states, and shadcn/tweakcn token coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding the theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class design-system poster composition.
Required visible sections: Morphous Geyser, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, token charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: deep geothermal basin background, warm dark mineral surfaces, steam-white text, blue-pool primary accents, tan mineral secondary accents, silica focus highlights, subtle amber alert signal, crisp cards and controls.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, restrained operational alert interface, 8px card radius, readable labels, exact component states.
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic purple gradients, no beach/ocean theme, no volcano lava, no flat pure-black-only background, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny labels, no misspelling of "Morphous Geyser".
